instructions.text: Coat in olive oil and rub/spices

lines.note: with olive oil & cajun rub (or other spice mix)

recipes.title: Grilled tri tip
instructions: Grill meat, add vegetable

recipes.title: Grilled burger
instructions: Grill meat, add vegetable

recipes.title: Grilled hot link
instructions: Grill meat, add vegetable

recipes.title: Grilled wings
instructions: Grill meat, add vegetable

recipes.title: Grilled carne asada
instructions: Grill meat, add vegetable

recipes.title: Grilled chicken
instructions: Grill meat, add vegetable

recipes.title: Pot roast (Keto, crock pot)
instructions: Coat roast in salt and pepper, add ingredients to crock pot, cook 6 hrs (or until shredable), shred, cook 1 hr

recipes.title: Taco chicken (crock pot)
instructions: Cut up vegetables, mix chicken, vegetables, salsa in crock pot
Cook 6 hours, shred
Add seasoning, cook 1-2 hours
Plate with rice, avocado, chips, etc. as needed

recipes.title: Meatballs (Keto)
instructions: Mix main items together in large bowl, form into meatballs
Cook in skillet 15 min or air fry ~ 10 min (or combo - brown in skillet and then air fry)

recipes.title: Sausage pasta
instructions: Cook sausage in air fryer ~10 minutes at 400
Boil pasta
Slice sausage, combine and eat
Microwave if needed to melt cheese and warm sauce

recipes.title: Mozzarella crusted chicken
instructions: Preheat oven to 425
Combine panko, mozzarella, italian seasoning, salt, pepper, 1 tbsp olive oil
Coat top of chicken with sour cream
Mound and press panko mixture to top of chicken (not bottom)
Bake 17 minutes

recipes.title: Dijon onion chicken
instructions: Preheat oven to 425
Season chicken with salt and pepper all over
Spread ½ tbsp dressing per chicken breast
Top chicken with cheese
Crush up onion, add onion on top of chicken
Press chicken to adhere onion and cheese
Bake 5 min, add green beans (toss in olive oil, salt, pepper), then bake 15 min

recommendedSides.label: Garlic bread (also green beans in recipe)

recipes.title: Cayenne breaded chicken
instructions: Heat oven to 425
Melt 1 tbsp butter in microwave (30 sec)
Add panko, monterey jack, Frank's seasoning (but leave ½ tsp for sauce), and salt and pepper
Pat dry chicken, add salt and pepper
Mound top of chicken with panko mix, press firm to adhere
Bake chicken 15-18 minutes
Mix sour cream with ½ tsp Frank's blend, add a bit of water to get it to drizzling consistency

recipes.title: Lemon italian chicken w/ spaghetti
instructions: Boil water, wash zucchini and lemon
Trim and quarter zucchini, cut into ½ inch slices, toss in olive oil, salt, pepper, a bit of parmesan
Peel and mince garlic
Zest and quarter lemon
Cover chicken in italian seasoning, salt, and pepper, olive oil.
Air fry chicken and zucchini: Air fry chicken for 13 min (add zucchini after 5 min; zucchini should cook for 7-9 min)
Cook spaghetti while air frying
Cook spaghetti 11 minutes; keep 1 cup pasta water
Make sauce while cooking others (start 5 min into spaghetti)
Saute garlic, lemon zest, pinch of chili flakes for 30 seconds
Add ½ cup pasta water, stock concentrate, and juice from 2 lemon wedges
Simmer 1-2 min
Add spaghetti, sour cream, 1 tbsp butter to saucepan. Plus 1.5 tbsp parmesan
Serve with chicken

recipes.title: Chicken pita pockets
instructions: Slice cucumber into ¼ inch thick quarter moon slices
Chop chicken into small pieces
Pan fry chicken for 4-6 minutes, adding garlic powder, salt, and pepper
Mix cucumbers and dressing
Cut pitas in half, line with hummus
Mix in chicken and cucumber salad

recipes.title: Miso Salmon
instructions: Mix glaze
Sautee salmon skin-side up 3-5 min (cover pan with foil)
Flip, cook 2 min
Add glaze, cook 1-2 min

recipes.title: Curry peanut chicken
instructions: Slice up chicken
Coat chicken in cornstarch
Mix sauce; add to chicken after completed
Heat thin layer of olive oil in pan
Sautee Chicken - cook without stirring for 3-4 min
Cook with stirring 3-4 min

recipes.title: Soy glazed meatloaf
instructions: Mix glaze
Zest garlic
Prep potatoes per **Sliced potatoes** side (slice or dice, toss with olive oil, salt, and pepper)
Mix meatloaf together, shape into loaf (7 inches x 3 inches), add salt and pepper
Put loaf on pan, top with half the glaze
Add potatoes to the pan with the loaf
Cook for 22 min at 450
Let sit for 2 minutes
Add other half of glaze
Alternate mushroom sauce: Roast meatloaf (no glaze or sauce).
Trim and thinly slice mushroom; saute with salt and pepper 2-4 minutes (until soft).
Add stock concentrate and ¼ cup water; boil, then reduce to low simmer for 2-3 minutes.
Turn off heat, add 1.5 tbsp sour cream and 1 tbsp butter; add to meatloaf once ready.

lines.note: ¼ cup before + ¼ cup after OR

recommendedSides.label: Roasted sliced/diced potatoes (same pan timing as meatloaf)

recipes.title: Steak and spicy soy sauce
instructions: Mix glaze
Cook steaks in pan 10 minutes, then let rest 5 min
Slice steak
Add sauce to pan
Cook for 30 seconds to 1 minute, stirring
Turn off heat, add butter
Cook steaks in sauce if more time is needed, otherwise top steak with sauce

recipes.title: Steak and jam/honey mustard sauce
instructions: Mince garlic
Pat dry steak and season with salt and pepper (a lot)
Cook steak w/ drizzle olive oil on medium heat for 3-7 minutes per side (~5 min for medium); let rest for 3 min
Make sauce: Heat olive oil with garlic and chili flakes for 1-2 min
Add jam, vinegar, 1 tsp dijon, ¼ cup water. Cook 2-3 min (until sauce thickens)
Remove from heat, add creme fraiche and squeeze of lemon; salt and pepper to taste
Thinly slice steak, top with sauce

recipes.title: Chicken katsu curry
instructions: Coat chicken in flour, dip in egg, cover with panko, spray with pam
Air fry 10 minutes at 350, flip and cook for 4-6 more minutes
Prepare curry per instructions on box

recipes.title: Beef tortilla melts
instructions: Slice pepper in small strips
Microwave sour cream and cream cheese plus Cholula and 1 tsp water for 30 sec, then stir to combine
Saute pepper for 2-3 minutes (med heat)
Add beef to pepper and cook for 4-6 min (until browned), drain grease
Add stock concentrate
Spread tortillas and add half the cream sauce across one side of each tortilla
Add beef filling and cheddar cheese
Melt 1 tbsp of butter to pan, cook tortillas 3 min per side
Remove, cut, serve

recipes.title: Chili
instructions: Wash and dry produce
Quarter lime
Trim and slice scallions; separate whites from greens
Thinly slice one jalapeno into circular slices
Mince/chop other jalapeno (remove insides for less spice)
Heat olive oil in big pot (5-6 quart)
Add scallion whites and minced jalapeno, cook 5-7 min
Add turkey and spices, cook 4-6 min
Add in tomato paste, cook 1-2 minutes
Add beans (plus liquid from can), stock concentrate, and ½ cup of water. Stir. Bring to simmer and cook until thickened (8-10 min)
Serve with sour cream, scallion greens, and sliced jalapeno

recipes.title: Tortellini
instructions: Cook tortellini, add sauce

recipes.title: Quesadilla (with leftovers)
instructions: Cook quesadilla, add meat (reheated)

recipes.title: Air fryer asparagus
instructions: Trim woody ends.
Toss with olive oil, salt, and pepper.
Air fry at 400°F for 6–8 minutes, tossing halfway through.

recipes.title: Air fryer Brussels sprouts
instructions: Halve or quarter any very large sprouts.
Toss with olive oil, salt, and pepper.
Air fry at 375°F for 10 minutes, shaking or tossing halfway through.

recipes.title: Air fryer broccoli
instructions: Cut into medium florets.
Toss with olive oil, salt, and pepper.
Air fry at 400°F for 6 minutes, tossing halfway through.

recipes.title: Air fryer squash
instructions: Cut into uniform pieces (similar size for even cooking).
Toss with olive oil, salt, and pepper.
Air fry at 400°F for 8 minutes, tossing halfway through.

recipes.title: Air fryer potatoes
instructions: Cut into bite-size pieces.
Toss with olive oil, salt, and pepper; add Italian seasoning if you like.
Air fry at 400°F for 18–20 minutes, tossing halfway through, until tender inside and crisp outside.

recipes.title: Air fryer zucchini chips
instructions: Slice zucchini into thin chips; pat dry if very wet.
Toss with olive oil, salt, pepper, and Parmesan; add panko if using.
Air fry in a single layer until crisp, checking often so they don’t burn.

recipes.title: Sautéed spinach
instructions: Heat a little olive oil in a large pan over medium-high heat.
Add spinach in batches if needed; sauté until wilted.
Season with salt and pepper.

recipes.title: Regular rice
instructions: Wash rice
1.5 cup of water for 1 cup of brown rice
15 min on cook
5 min natural release

recipes.title: Fried rice
instructions: Make rice then put in pan w/ olive oil
Let rice sit for 3-4 minutes (don't stir)
Add soy sauce (1 tbsp), cook 1 min
Cook vegetables / egg separately and combine rice and vegetables

recipes.title: Garlic bread
instructions: Cut bread in half, add butter and parmesan, cook for 5 min

recipes.title: Mashed potatoes
instructions: Boil potatoes for 15 minutes
Drain water (keep some in a cup)
Mash
Add sour cream and water as necessary, add salt and pepper and butter

recipes.title: Sliced potatoes
instructions: Preheat oven to 450°F (or match the main if roasting together).
Slice or dice potatoes; toss with olive oil, salt, and pepper.
Spread on a sheet pan in one layer.
Roast 20–25 minutes at 450°F, flipping once, until tender and browned.
With soy glazed meatloaf: add potatoes to the pan with the loaf and roast about 22 minutes as in that recipe.

recipes.title: Lemon panko burrata salad
instructions: Mince garlic
Cook panko and garlic for 3-5 min on medium heat (with drizzle of olive oil)
Stir in lemon zest, add salt and pepper
Mix arugula with 2 sqz lemon juice and 2 tbsp olive oil, salt and pepper
Serve with arugula and burrata

recipes.title: Lemon spaghetti
instructions: Boil water, wash zucchini and lemon
Trim and quarter zucchini, cut into ½ inch slices, toss in olive oil, salt, pepper, a bit of parmesan
Peel and mince garlic
Zest and quarter lemon
Cook zucchini: Air fry zucchini 7-9 min; combine with any main going into air fryer
Cook spaghetti while air frying
Cook spaghetti 11 minutes; keep 1 cup pasta water
Make sauce while cooking others (start 5 min into spaghetti)
Saute garlic, lemon zest, pinch of chili flakes for 30 seconds
Add ½ cup pasta water, stock concentrate, and juice from 2 lemon wedges
Simmer 1-2 min
Add spaghetti, sour cream, 1 tbsp butter to saucepan. Plus 1.5 tbsp parmesan
Serve with main
